sections.sectionTitle: Sal A Suak Jerusalem Mite' Dahna

verses.text: Khatvei lai-in mi a dimtakin a ten'na Jerusalem khuapi bangzah takin gamdai ahi hiam? Leitung bup in a zahtak khuapi tu-in meigong tawh a kibang ta hi. Leitunga om khuapi khempeuhte' lak panin a thupi pen khuapi tu-in salin a kiman khinzo hi

Amah zan khuavakin kap a, a khitui a biang tungah a tak kauhkauh hi. Amah a it ngeite khempeuh a hehnem ding khat beek a om nawn kei hi. A kipawlpihte khempeuh in amah khemin, tu-in a langpan' khinta uh hi
Judah mite, a huh ding a neilo silate bangin a inn panun kihawlkhia hi. Amaute gamdangah teng uh a, amau' gam ding a om kei hi. Galte in umcih uh a, a suahtak theihna ding uh lampi a om kei hi

Ni siangtho ni ciangin Pasian a bia dingin Biakinnpi-ah kuamah a pai nawn kei hi. Tua lai-a lasa numeite in gimna thuak uh a, siampite a tau uh hi. Khua kongpi-ah kuamah om nawnlo a, Jerusalem khuapi in gimna a thuak hi
A galte gualzo uh a, amaute a nuaisiah gawp uh hi. Mawhna tampi a neih manun, Topa in tua bangin gimna a thuaksak hi. A mite khempeuh sila dingin a kipuakhia hi
Jerusalem a minthan'na teng a maimang zota hi. A makaite uh, lonona mun muloin a vak kawikawi, sabengte a muh ciangin tailahpi-in a tai teitei sazuk tawh kibang hi
Tu-in Jerusalem kisiazo ta a, nidanga a thupinate a nung phawkkik hi. Galte in a sim laitakin a huh ding khat beek a om kei hi. Guallel ahih manin a galte in a nuihsan uh hi
A minthan'na teng a beita hi. A guaktangin om ahih manin a maizum hi. Thumin tau a, a zum manin a mai a hum hi. Jerusalem in mawhna lian bawl ahih manin a kihhuai mahmah hi

A kihhuaina teng kimukhia pah hinapi, gimna thuak ding ahihlam a awlmawh tuan kei hi. Tua ahih manin gimna a thuakna lian lua mahmah a, kuamah in a hehnem zo kei hi. A galte in zo ahih manin Topa kiangah hehpihna a ngen hi
A galte in a neih a lam khempeuh a laksak khinmang hi. Biakinnpi sungah lut uh a, Topa in Gentailte a pai ding a phallohna munah a lut uh a mu hi
Amaute, a thum kawmsa-in annek zong dingin a paikhia uh hi. A nuntak theihna dingun a sum a paai uh tawh an a khek uh hi. Khuapi in, “Hong en in Topa aw, ka thuakna teng hong mu in,” ci-in a kiko hi
A kiim a pamah a pai mi khempeuh kiangah, “Hong en in, kei' thuak zahin gimna a thuak, Topa in a heh laitakin a hong thuaksak gimna a thuak kei longal, midang kuamah omlo hi,” ci-in a kiko hi
Amah in vantung panin meikuang hong khiasuk a, ka sunglam a hong kang hi. Amah in thang hong siah a, awkin leilakah ka kipuk hi. Tua bangin natna ka thuak tawntung hi

Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh a vekpi-in ciamteh a, tuate henin lomkhat suahin ka ngawngzangah hong khih a, gik lua mahmah ahih manin ka taangzo peuhmah kei hi. Topa in ka galte' khutsungah hong pia ahih manin a cimawh ta ka hi hi

Topa in ka galkap a thahat pente nuihsan lel a, amah in kei a hong sim ding, ka tangvalte a susia dingin galkap honpi a hong kuansak hi. Amah in ka nungakte leenggah gawizan bangin a hong gawizansak hi
Tua ahih manin ka mit pan khitui a dimletin a luang hi. Hong hehnem ding leh a hong hanthawn ding kuamah omlo hi. Galte in hong zo khin a, ka mite a cimawh uh hi
Hong huh un, ci-in ka khut ka vanvan hangin kuamah in a hong huh nuam kei hi. Topa in mun khempeuh panin galte hong paisak a, amaute in a kihhuai na khat bangin kei a hong gimneih uh hi

Topa a thutang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in ama thu a manglo ka hi hi. Mun khempeuhah a om mite aw, ka thugenna hong ngai un. Ka thuaknate hong mu dih un. Ka khangno numei leh pasalte salin a kipuakhia hi
Ka kipawlpihte ka sapsap hangin a hong huh nuam kei uh hi. A nuntakna ding uh an a zon'na lamun siampite leh makaite kongzing lakah a si uh hi
Topa aw, ka thuaknate, ka lunggimnate hong en in. Ka mawhna hangin dah mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a kitam hi. Kongzing lakah kithahna om a, innsungah zong sihna mah a om hi

Ka tauna hong ngai in; kei a hong hehnem ding kuamah dang om nawnlo hi. Gimna nong thuaksak manin ka galte lungdam lua uh hi. Na ni ciam ni hong tungsak in la, kei' thuak bangin ka galte zong thuaksak in
A gitlohna hangun amaute tungah thu khen in. Ka mawhna hangin gim nong piak mah bangin amaute zong gim pia in. Gimna ka thuak manin ka tautau a, ka lungsim a gim mahmah hi.
